flow_context.story: Cross-timeframe flow leans bullish, but the immediate tape is a high-toxicity balance auction under resistance. cvd_pack is bullish and futures-led right now with delta_fut 651.1400000000002, delta_spot 23.37930000000001, cvd_slope_fut 146.17285139043287, and likely_driver futures. Whale flow is bearish on the very short horizon but bullish on the tradeable higher horizons: 15m fut_whale_delta_notional is -1078056.39607 and 1h is -2340928.7126300004, while 4h is 38449149.82647 and 1d is 37350361.94913. tpo_market_profile shows the market auctioning higher inside the current session, with tpo_poc 2087.46, tpo_vah 2090.22, tpo_val 2083.36, and price 2090.21 sitting almost exactly at VAH, so upside initiative is testing resistance but has not cleanly accepted above it yet. Absorption is mixed but locally slightly supportive: bullish_absorption printed at 2086.0 with score 0.7488870541894335 and spot_confirm true, while the nearby bearish_absorption at 2088.62 scored 0.6406149346699092 and spot_confirm false. Exhaustion is clearly two-sided: buying_exhaustion capped 2090.38 with score 0.9999999999993462 and spot_exhaustion_confirm true, while selling_exhaustion defended 2082.12 with score 0.999999999999788 and spot_exhaustion_confirm true. VPIN is high, not directional, with vpin_fut 0.7550679999999055, vpin_spot 0.5579942399999898, and toxicity_state high. Net result: 4h/1d participants still look net long, but 15m is balancing between strong downside defense and equally clear overhead exhaustion.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in a higher-timeframe bullish structure but a short-term balancing phase. The 1d trend remains bullish and the 4h trend is bullish with strong participation, because price is still above anchored VWAP and far above the 4h/1d EMA baselines, and higher-timeframe whales and CVD have been net supportive. The 15m, however, is not trending cleanly; it is rotating inside a session range after rebounding from the low 2082s into resistance around 2090-2098. In practice, the market is a bullish backdrop compressing under resistance: short-term mean reversion dominates unless price can gain acceptance above the 15m ceiling near 2090.38 and then the 4h high at 2098.58. If that does not happen, the tape can continue to rotate back through 2087-2083 while the larger 4h/1d uptrend remains intact.

15m.story: I label 15m Sideways. Current futures price is 2090.21. The clearest structure comes from the session profile, not from trend continuation: tpo_market_profile shows tpo_val 2083.36, tpo_poc 2087.46, tpo_vah 2090.22, initial_balance_low 2084.06, and initial_balance_high 2095.76; price is sitting almost exactly at VAH, so the market is at the top of balance rather than in confirmed upside acceptance. price_volume_structure 15m reinforces rotation with poc_price 2088.36, vah 2089.78, and val 2087.19. The most important flow evidence is two-sided exhaustion: buying_exhaustion printed at pivot_price 2090.38 with score 0.9999999999993462 and spot_exhaustion_confirm true, while selling_exhaustion printed at pivot_price 2082.12 with score 0.999999999999788 and spot_exhaustion_confirm true. Absorption is also two-way: bullish_absorption at pivot_price 2086.0 scored 0.7488870541894335 with spot_confirm true, but bearish_absorption at pivot_price 2088.62 scored 0.6406149346699092 with spot_confirm false. Short-horizon order flow is mixed rather than directional: cvd_pack 15m latest delta_fut is 237.7850000000006 while delta_spot is -34.439999999999976; orderbook_depth 15m has obi_fut 0.2566884311481787 but ofi_fut -237.74900000000372 and ofi_norm_fut -1.3743582974362605; whale_trades 15m shows fut_whale_delta_notional -1078056.39607. The contradictory signals are bullish trend filters and recent upside initiatives: ema_trend_regime 15m is bull, ema_13 2087.99 > ema_21 2087.38 > ema_34 2086.83, avwap_fut is 2067.71 so price_minus_avwap_fut is 22.5, rvwap 15m is 2088.2369677166303 with z_price_minus_rvwap 0.91, and recent bullish_initiation printed at 2085.13 with score 0.6833109812164262 and at 2088.4 with score 0.6965256736639296. I overrode those bullish signals because they describe the broader backdrop, but the immediate 15m tape is still trapped between a defended downside zone and a spot-confirmed exhaustion cap at 2090.38. Claude Opus 4.6 would likely also call this a sideways auction inside a broader bullish context, not a clean 15m trend.

1d.story: I label 1d Bullish. The daily structure is still a rising sequence of closes even though today is pausing: kline_history daily closed at 2035.39 on 2026-03-10, 2050.99 on 2026-03-11, 2072.6 on 2026-03-12, 2091.01 on 2026-03-13, and 2095.27 on 2026-03-14, while the current unclosed day is 2090.21 after opening 2095.28. ema_trend_regime is bull on the higher timeframe, with ema_100_htf 1d at 1919.99 and ema_200_htf 1d at 1880.89, leaving price well above both. avwap 1d is 2067.61, so price_minus_avwap_fut is 22.5. rvwap 1d is 2081.3294113678458 with z_price_minus_rvwap 0.77, so price is still trading above the daily session's average price. The key daily acceptance area is price_volume_structure 1d: poc_price 2075.82, hvn_levels includes 2075.815, vah 2091.54, val 2062.95. I use 2075.82 as support because it is the daily POC/HVN, and 2105.75 as resistance because that is the recent daily high from kline_history on 2026-03-14. Whale participation remains supportive on this timeframe: whale_trades 1d fut_whale_delta_notional is 37350361.94913 with 551 buys versus 492 sells, and spot_whale_delta_notional is 755111.9247999999. Daily CVD history also supports the broader uptrend even though today is weak: cvd_pack 1d showed delta_fut 319331.8140000003 on 2026-03-14 and 116931.71700000038 on 2026-03-13. The contradicting signals are meaningful and are why agreement is only mixed: the current unclosed 1d candle is red from 2095.28 to 2090.21, cvd_pack 1d current delta_fut is -22903.317000000006 and delta_spot is -5920.722800000005, footprint 1d window_delta is -6887.556999999959, and buying_exhaustion recently printed at 2090.38 with score 0.9999999999993462 and spot_exhaustion_confirm true. I overrode those because they describe a pause near the top of the daily value area, not a broken daily uptrend; price still holds above AVWAP, above daily RVWAP, and above the 2075.82 acceptance node. Claude Opus 4.6 would likely make the same call: daily trend still bullish, but with clear evidence of near-term stalling under resistance.

4h.story: I label 4h Bullish. The recent 4h structure has turned up after the earlier dip: kline_history 4h closed at 2072.65 on 2026-03-14 12:00, 2073.55 on 16:00, 2076.25 on 20:00, and then 2095.27 on the 2026-03-14 20:00 bar, which also printed a high of 2098.58. The current live 4h candle is 2090.21 after opening 2095.28, so it is a pullback inside the prior impulse rather than a clear structural failure. ema_trend_regime is bull on 4h, and price is far above ema_100_htf 2025.24 and ema_200_htf 2000.91. avwap 4h is 2067.61, leaving price 22.5 above the 7d anchored VWAP. Participation confirms the bullish read: cvd_pack 4h latest closed bar has delta_fut 35591.616000000045, delta_spot 682.2764999999999, relative_delta_fut 0.10635586862756996, and relative_delta_spot 0.02976043715352548; whale_trades 4h shows fut_whale_delta_notional 38449149.82647 with 96 buy versus 60 sell; footprint 4h window_delta is 16994.21999999998. price_volume_structure 4h shows value concentrated higher with poc_price 2095.4, val 2086.76, and vah 2097.67, which is why I use 2086.76 as support. I use 2098.58 as resistance because it is the last completed 4h swing high. The contradicting signals are that the live bar is currently red, rvwap 4h is 2090.405218990427 so z_price_minus_rvwap is -0.25, and recent buying_exhaustion printed at 2098.58 with score 0.8957819339433922 and at 2090.38 with score 0.9999999999993462. I overrode those because they read as pullback and overhead friction inside a still-bullish 4h structure; none of them negate the higher close sequence, strong 4h CVD, or strong 4h whale accumulation. Claude Opus 4.6 would likely also call 4h bullish here.
